name: Academorix
tagline: Run every sport from one command center
description: Sport-agnostic academy management for scheduling, parent communication, and automated billing.

usage.isotipo: Use the compact symbol-only isotype in constrained contexts such as login screens, signup screens, mobile headers, collapsed sidebars, and app icons. On login and signup screens, render it at least 44x44.
usage.logotipo: Use the complete wordmark/logotype in expanded sidebars, full headers, and brand bars. Keep header wordmarks compact by default.
